subject: fix(structure): sync global cell selection during layout structure changes
body:
LayoutTab maintained an internal structureSelection that correctly followed
swaps, inserts, and removals — but never updated the global selectedCell
(used by ContextBar, MediaTab, ContentTab, StyleTab, and canvas overlay).
After reordering rows/columns, the global selection pointed to the wrong cell.

Now all five structure-changing operations (swapSections, insertSection,
removeSection, addSubdivision, removeSubdivision) update the global
selectedCell via onSelectCell and sync lastInternalCell.current to prevent
the useEffect sync from re-triggering.

Tags: state, layout, structure, ux, cell-selection
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
